data.title: JCDecaux expands its street furniture offering in Tokyo through the acquisition of VISTA COMMUNICATIONS Inc.
data.description: JCDecaux has broadened its street furniture services in Tokyo by acquiring VISTA COMMUNICATIONS Inc. This move strengthens JCDecaux's presence in the city and allows them to offer a more extensive range of street furniture options to the public. This acquisition is sure to benefit both companies, with JCDecaux gaining a stronger foothold in the market and VISTA COMMUNICATIONS Inc. likely receiving a significant boost in resources and support. The exact financial details of the acquisition have not been disclosed publicly.
Israeli ambulance service reports two injured after rocket shrapnel falls in Bnei Brak.
Iranian reports say Sirjan air base in the south has been attacked.

data.title: Crypto-Focused Asset Manager CoinShares Prepares For Nasdaq Debut Following SPAC Merger
data.description: CoinShares, an asset management firm, is set to make its Nasdaq trading debut following a successful merger. The company announced the merger with Vine Hill Capital Investment Corp. (NASDAQ: VCIC) and Odysseus Holdings Ltd. The move will transition CoinShares' listing from Nasdaq Stockholm to the U.S. Nasdaq Stock Market. This merger led to the creation of a new holding company, CoinShares PLC. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
UAE authorities deal with farm damage in Fujairah after drone interception debris lands.
UAE: AUTHORITIES IN FUJAIRAH ARE HANDLING A SITUATION AT A FARM AFTER DEBRIS FROM A DRONE, WHICH WAS SHOT DOWN, FELL THERE.
Explosive sounds shake Jerusalem skies.

data.title: Audited annual report 2025
data.description: The Supervisory Board of AS Ekspress Grupp has given the green light to the group's audited annual report for 2025. The report will now be forwarded to the General Meeting of Shareholders for final approval.

data.title: Announcement of Early Redemption (incl. Record Date and Payment Date) of Coop Pank Tier 2 Subordinated Bonds
data.description: Coop Pank AS has decided to proceed with the early redemption of the subordinated bonds that were issued on 31 March 2021 under the ISIN code EE3300002047, known as Coop Pank 2031 Subordinated Bonds. This decision is in line with the Prospectus and Terms and Conditions of the Coop Pank 2031 Subordinated Bonds, allowing for early redemption, either in part or in full, after 31 March 2026. The investors are to be informed at least 30 days in advance, and approval from the financial supervision authority is required. The Estonian Financial Supervision and Resolution Authority granted approval for the early redemption of the Coop Pank 2031 Subordinated Bonds on 2 March 2026.

data.title: Kitron: Notice of Annual General Meeting on 24 April 2026 at 10:00 a.m. CEST
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Kitron's Annual General Meeting is scheduled to take place at 10:00 a.m. CEST. This year, the meeting will be conducted entirely online due to the circumstances, and shareholders are encouraged to join digitally. Attendance in person will not be permitted. Shareholders have the option to vote beforehand or appoint a proxy to vote on their behalf.

data.title: Corbion published agenda for AGM
data.description: Corbion has outlined the agenda for its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM) scheduled for May 13, 2026.

data.title: Construction notice to proceed in Latvia (defence campus of DCC)
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Defence Construction Canada (DCC) authorized the commencement of construction activities under a design-and-build contract with PS MB.MEE, a division of AS Merko Ehitus group. This contract involves building a defense campus consisting of permanent accommodation structures and support area infrastructure in two separate sites within Latvia.

data.title: Reju Secures €135 Million in Dutch NIKI Funding for Industrial-Scale Textile-to-Textile Regeneration Hub at Chemelot Industrial Park, the Netherlands
data.description: In Paris on April 1, 2026, Reju™, a company specializing in textile-to-textile regeneration, received a financial boost of €135 million through the Nationale Investeringsregeling Klimaatprojecten Industrie (NIKI) program in the Netherlands. This funding will aid Reju in executing their upcoming initiatives.
Debris from rockets reported in two central areas of Israel.

data.title: Moody's rates New Hampshire's Bitcoin bond at Ba2, below investment grade due to Bitcoin's volatility.
data.description: New Hampshire's bond project received a provisional Ba2 rating from Moody's, indicating it is below investment grade due to concerns over Bitcoin's volatility.
